_comment: Patristic MCP — 63k verse-indexed commentaries + 765 full ANF/NPNF works. 7 tools.
_setup: git clone, npm install, npm run build, npm run ingest, npm run ingest-writings.

_databases.patristic.db: 63,706 verse-indexed commentaries from 318 church fathers (119 MB)
_databases.writings.db: 765 full works in 10,013 sections from 341 authors (230 MB)
